quotes.text: The pain of discipline is far less than the pain of regret.
You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence is not an act, but a habit.
The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
People do not decide their futures. They decide their habits, and their habits decide their futures.
Motivation gets you started. Commitment keeps you going.
You will never always be motivated. You have to learn to be disciplined.
A year from now you will wish you had started today.
Done is better than perfect.
If it's important to you, you'll find a way. If not, you'll find an excuse.
Your future self is watching you right now through memories.
Accountability breeds response-ability.
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
Failure is not the opposite of success; it's part of success.
The comeback is always stronger than the setback.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
You promised yourself this. Don't break promises to the most important person in your life.
This discomfort is temporary. Regret is permanent.
Right now, someone you care about believes you can do this. Prove them right.
You chose this. That means you already believe you can do it.
Every task you complete builds evidence that you're the person you want to be.
